title: Respond command
description:
Add an /r command to your server.
You can respond to the latest msg you got with /r
body:
# What is it?
This is a response mod. Have you ever thought that it's annoying to respond to people on servers when you need to write /msg <playername> <message>. Now you can just write /r <message> and you will respond to the latest person who sent a message to you

# Commands

```
/r <message>
```
# Looking for a server?
Get BisectHosting and save 25% off for new customers using code Lukas at checkout. Thanks for your support - it helps me develop this and other mods I make! #ad
